SEQUENCE.COMMENT: getDevByWfIID - get the developer of the workflow

MAP.COMMENT: SELECT DEVELOPER,DESCRIPTION FROM TFW_WORKFLOW,TFW_USER WHERE (developer=user_id) AND WORKFLOW_IID='%sWorkflowIID%'

Values.value: SELECT DEVELOPER,DESCRIPTION FROM TFW_WORKFLOW,TFW_USER WHERE REPLACE(REPLACE(developer,'emeaipaper\',''),'naipaper\','')=REPLACE(REPLACE(user_id,'emeaipaper\',''),'naipaper\','') AND WORKFLOW_IID='%sWorkflowIID%'
